_README: PRE-REGISTRATION GATE (I6, no gamed gates). These thresholds were COMMITTED BY A HUMAN before any measurement was taken (committed_by/committed_date below are the attestation). They decide every later acceptance criterion. Do NOT alter them after measurement begins — that would defeat the pre-registration. See bin/preregistration.mjs REQUIRED_THRESHOLDS for what each gates and its valid range. An out-of-range value is gate corruption (HARD test failure), not a clean HALT.
